intent.raw: smoking cigs, working on coding at home.

input.raw: smoking cigs, working on coding at home.

visibility.world_tone: A solitary, late-night atmosphere in a modern, well-maintained home office, dominated by the focused tension of a coder's grind, with the lingering haze of smoke adding a layer of weary, introspective calm.

turn_history.narrative: The soft, rhythmic tap of keys is the only sound that matters, punctuated by the faint, papery crackle of burning tobacco. You take a slow drag, the ember flaring in the dim light of the monitor, casting a brief, orange glow over the lines of code scrolling past. The smoke curls up, a lazy grey ghost in the blue-white glare of the screen, adding its acrid, familiar layer to the still air of the room. Your focus narrows to the logic puzzle on the display, the world outside the window reduced to a dark pane holding only the reflection of a man, a desk, and the glowing tip of a cigarette.

visibility.world_tone: A solitary, late-night atmosphere in a modern, well-maintained home office, dominated by the focused tension of a coder's grind, with the lingering haze of smoke adding a layer of weary, introspective calm.

turn_history.narrative: You go north, your chair rolling smoothly across the hardwood floor, the soft whir of its casters the only sound as you push away from the desk. The motion carries you into the cooler, still air of the hallway, the dim glow from the monitor shrinking behind you. The scent of old wood and dust, undisturbed, hangs here, a quiet corridor lined with closed doors that swallow the light, their frames just darker lines in the shadow. At the far end, a window looks out onto the deep indigo of the night, a rectangle of faint starlight against the black.

visibility.world_tone: A solitary, late-night atmosphere in a modern, well-maintained home office, dominated by the focused tension of a coder's grind, with the lingering haze of smoke adding a layer of weary, introspective calm.

turn_history.narrative: You roll north, the soft hum of your chair’s casters a steady rhythm on the hardwood floor. The hallway stretches before you, dim and quiet, lined with identical closed doors that hold their secrets. At the far end, the window frames a square of deep, starless night, its glass reflecting the faint, lonely glow of a monitor left on in a room behind you. The air here is cooler, carrying the faint, clean scent of wood polish and the distant, ghostly memory of tobacco.

visibility.world_tone: A solitary, late-night atmosphere in a modern, well-maintained home office, dominated by the focused tension of a coder's grind, with the lingering haze of smoke adding a layer of weary, introspective calm.

turn_history.narrative: You roll east, the soft whir of your chair's casters the only sound in the quiet house, carrying you from the dim hallway into the open space of the living room. The shift is immediate: the claustrophobic line of doors gives way to a wider, darker expanse. The blue glow from your monitor in the office behind you stretches a long, pale finger across the hardwood, illuminating dust motes drifting in the still air. The room itself is a landscape of vague shapes—the dark bulk of a sofa, the sharp corner of a bookshelf, the faint reflective rectangle of a television screen turned off. It feels unused, a museum of quiet hours, the air here cooler and carrying the faint, clean scent of wood polish overlaid on the ever-present, comforting haze of old smoke. Your movement ceases; you have crossed a threshold into a deeper pool of the night's stillness.
